2026-02-27T02:01:24.4886866Z git version 2.53.0
2026-02-27T02:01:24.4921277Z Copying '/home/runner/.gitconfig' to '/home/runner/work/_temp/3b614a74-dce2-4cc8-bd6b-d832aa46d19f/.gitconfig'
2026-02-27T02:01:24.4930678Z Temporarily overriding HOME='/home/runner/work/_temp/3b614a74-dce2-4cc8-bd6b-d832aa46d19f' before making global git config changes
2026-02-27T02:01:24.4932102Z Adding repository directory to the temporary git global config as a safe directory
2026-02-27T02:01:24.4936211Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --global --add safe.directory /home/runner/work/coding/coding
2026-02-27T02:01:24.4968402Z Removing SSH command configuration
2026-02-27T02:01:24.4975532Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp core\.sshCommand
2026-02-27T02:01:24.5010930Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'core\.sshCommand' && git config --local --unset-all 'core.sshCommand' || :"
2026-02-27T02:01:24.5248014Z Removing HTTP extra header
2026-02-27T02:01:24.5253876Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader
2026-02-27T02:01:24.5288605Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader' && git config --local --unset-all 'http.https://github.com/.extraheader' || :"
2026-02-27T02:01:24.5518699Z Removing includeIf entries pointing to credentials config files
2026-02-27T02:01:24.5524794Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp ^includeIf\.gitdir:
2026-02-27T02:01:24.5559563Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive git config --local --show-origin --name-only --get-regexp remote.origin.url
